rules.rule_text:
rule DarkRAT
{
	meta:
		author = " Kevin Breen <kevin@techanarchy.net>"
		date = "2014/04"
		ref = "http://malwareconfig.com/stats/DarkRAT"
		maltype = "Remote Access Trojan"
		filetype = "exe"

	strings:
		$a = "@1906dark1996coder@"
		$b = "SHEmptyRecycleBinA"
		$c = "mciSendStringA"
		$d = "add_Shutdown"
		$e = "get_SaveMySettingsOnExit"
		$f = "get_SpecialDirectories"
		$g = "Client.My"

	condition:
		all of them
}
